caption: A man with a short haircut and a beard is recorded in a studio setting against a dark, ribbed acoustic foam wall. He wears a white t-shirt and large black over-ear headphones. A silver professional microphone, mounted on a black boom arm, is positioned in front of him. The boom arm features the legible text "Saramonic". As the scene progresses, the man speaks into the microphone, moving his mouth and gesturing with his hands. In the initial frames, he is relatively still, but he eventually raises his right hand and moves it in a sweeping motion across the frame. His left arm, which features tattoos, is partially visible in the lower portion of the shot. The lighting is consistent throughout the sequence, focusing on the man as he speaks and gestures.
